content.en:
When the Ice Ghost Organization was dealing with Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace and other supreme forces, Ye Tian had been using the Flawless Pupil, a super dimensional secret treasure, to spy on it.

Spying on the pinnacle realm god of the Ice Ghost Organization is not only Ye Tian, even if it is discovered, it is not a big deal.

Soon, Ye Tian roughly judged the strength of these peak realm gods of the Ice Ghost Organization.

"These peak realm gods have not yet burst out with full strength, but the general strength is almost the same, the weakest of these peak realm gods is estimated to be not much weaker than the Liangyi realm gods, and there are more than sixty of them. If I hadn't fused with the higher extradimensional things, I would have been far from being their opponent. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Now, he had the hope of dealing with these Peak Realm Gods, but he couldn't deal with these Peak Realm Gods at the same time, otherwise he would also be easily besieged.

"It's time to find the Liangyi Realm Gods to cooperate with them, the six Supreme Realm Gods such as the Liangyi Realm Gods can at least deal with the six Peak Realm Gods, and the other Peak Realm Gods can also deal with a dozen or so Peak Realm Gods together, which can relieve the pressure on me. And if I launch a surprise attack, I might be able to kill a few peak realm gods. "

After the plan, he went to find the gods of the Liangyi Realm.

......

Headquarters of the Two Realms. 490

At this time, a large number of peak realm gods gathered here and were attacking the enchantment.

However.

The enchantment was too strong, and even if there were a large number of them, they still couldn't break the enchantment formed by the Extradimensional Boundary Bead in a short period of time.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian came here, and it was eight replica bodies that appeared together.

This is all the copy body he can dispatch at the moment, after all, he still has to leave a copy body to stay in the Endless Seam Realm, and leave a copy body in the Death Void, he can't remove the copy body on the side of the Death Void.

And all of his replica bodies are ten.

"Ye Tianjie God, just right, let's break the barrier together!"

The gods of the two rituals shouted.

Eight Ye Tian, such a number of clones may surprise them, but they didn't think so much at the moment, and they still ran for their lives.

However, Ye Tian shook his head and said, "Everyone, this barrier cannot be broken in a short period of time, you should know very well that the only way is to kill those foreign forces at the peak of the realm, maybe there is still hope." "

The god of the Liangyi Realm said helplessly: "We also know that this is the only way, but until the last moment, we are still unwilling to give up and escape." I've seen all of their strength, and the weakest peak realm god is estimated to be not much weaker than me. "

"I can deal with them!"

Ye Tian said.

"What, you can deal with them?"

The gods of the Liangyi Realm were shocked.

At this time, one of Ye Tian's duplicate bodies erupted with terrifying extradimensional power, which shocked the gods of the Liangyi Realm.

"Ye Tian Realm God, could it be that you have mastered the true extradimensional power?" "The Liangyi Realm God and other peak realm gods hurriedly asked.

"Not really. Ye Tian shook his head, "However, I have fused with high-level extradimensional things. "

"I'm afraid this is still not enough, your cultivation is still a little lower. "

The gods of the Liangyi Realm lost their way again.

"What if you add that!"

Ye Tian's body was densely packed with super dimensional secret treasures, and each copy body carried a large number of super dimensional secret treasures, and their number far exceeded before.

Moreover, although the other replica bodies did not fuse other high-level extra-dimensional things, they fused two medium-level extra-dimensional things, and their combat power was also a little stronger than that of the gods of the Liangyi Realm.

"We all join forces, and the powerful peak realm gods are all dealt with by me, if I fight hard, there is still hope to defeat them. Ye Tian said.

Seeing this, a glimmer of hope ignited in the hearts of the gods of the Liangyi Realm and the Taiyi Realm.

So, they all agreed.

And the other peak realm gods have to agree if they don't agree, of course, the human race also sent a group of peak realm gods to attack, which can be regarded as an increase in some combat power.

These ordinary peak realm gods were far from being the opponents of those peak realm gods of the Ice Ghost Organization, and if they were forced to fight, they would definitely be killed in an instant.

Therefore, a large number of ordinary peak realm gods use the power of the formation to participate in the battle, which can be regarded as contributing part of the combat power.

"These natives have all gone to one place!"

Seeing that those peak realm gods had all run to the side of the Two Realms Gate, the Blood Realm God no longer targeted them one by one, and directly brought more than sixty peak realm gods to the boundary where the Two Realms Gate was located.

They are going to directly destroy the Two Realms Gate, so that they don't have to deal with it slowly.

Although there will be some dangers, which may cause one or two peak realm gods to be injured, as long as he personally takes action, it is unlikely that the ice ghost organization will fall from the peak realm gods.

At this time. []

The peak realm gods of Xuandong Mountain followed the Ice Ghost Organization, and they were also very nervous.

If it weren't for the contract, they felt they would be dead.

Soon.

And they came to the Gate of the Two Realms.

Rumble!!!!

A temporary extradimensional formation was activated, an attack by the Supreme Forces against the Ice Ghost Organization.

"It's too weak!"

The Blood Realm God sneered, and with a wave of his hand, he shattered this extradimensional formation.

And at this very moment.

Ye Tian used the Transcendent Realm Wood Escape Light to kill one of the Ice Ghost Organization Peak Realm Gods, and the other copied bodies also took action.

"True Ming Light Domain!"

"True Ming Aurora!"

The coverage of the True Ming Light Domain is very large, and all the peak realm gods of the Ice Ghost Organization are covered.

"The Extradimensional Power of Higher Extradimensional Things!!!"

The Bloodline Realm Gods were all slightly shocked.

The pinnacle realm god wants to fuse high-level extra-dimensional things, but the difficulty is too high, and basically only a half-step super-dimensional realm can fuse high-level extra-dimensional things.

For a half-step extradimensional realm, high-level extradimensional things are a bit frivolous, and they can only be regarded as storing some extradimensional power and playing a little role at critical moments.

Therefore, extradimensional things are only suitable for peak realm gods.

And if the peak realm god wants to fuse the high-level extra-dimensional things, it is not impossible to do it, it needs a great existence of the super-dimensional realm to personally assist, and the use of the supreme super-dimensional treasure can hope to forcibly let a peak realm god fuse the high-level extra-dimensional things!

The Blood Realm God couldn't imagine how such a weak territory could give birth to a peak realm god who fused with a high-level extradimensional thing!

"Fortunately, the cultivation level of the gods in this realm is lower, otherwise I would definitely be killed by it!"

The Blood Realm God secretly said.

And at the moment when he was shocked, a peak realm god under his command was directly killed by Ye Tian using the True Ming Aurora to instantly pierce and kill in seconds.

A member of the Ice Ghost Order has fallen.

And the Blood Realm God reacted quickly, and the other peak Realm Gods also reacted quickly, attacking Ye Tian one after another.

At this time, Ye Tian urged the dense Star Wing Six-Arm Shield to resist their attacks, while he continued to use the True Ming Aurora to try to kill another Peak Realm God.

At the same time, the gods of the Liangyi Realm also started to assist Ye Tian and relieve some pressure for Ye Tian.
